compiled_state.title: Write RED test for brainstorm enrich-in-place path
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh with 4 tests verifying the brainstorm SKILL.md enrich-in-place section:

1. test_enrich_section_exists — SKILL.md contains an enrich-in-place section with streamlined Socratic dialogue instructions
2. test_enrich_updates_ticket_description — Enrich section instructs updating the ticket description (via ticket edit --description) with structured acceptance criteria, approach summary, and file paths
3. test_enrich_skips_epic_phases — Enrich section explicitly skips fidelity review, scenario analysis, ticket creation, complexity evaluation, and routing to downstream skills
4. test_enrich_preserves_ticket_type — Enrich section does not change the ticket type

Test approach: Each test reads SKILL.md and checks structural markers of the enrich-in-place section. For skill instruction files (markdown prose, not executable code), this is metadata/schema validation — acceptable structural test per defined exemption criteria. Behavioral correctness is tested at eval time (Task 3).

Follow the convention in tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh: use echo "=== test_name ===" section markers, SECTION variable, pass()/fail() helpers, and extract_section() utility.

Add .test-index entry with RED marker: append ,tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh [test_enrich_section_exists] to the existing brainstorm SKILL.md line in .test-index.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (append to brainstorm SKILL.md line)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh
- [ ] Test contains at least 4 test sections
  Verify: grep -c 'echo "=== test_' tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Running the test returns non-zero exit (RED state) pre-implementation
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry maps brainstorm SKILL.md to this test with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh \[test_enrich_section_exists\]' .test-index
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-enrich-in-place.sh (created), .test-index (modified). Tests: 0 passed, 4 failed (expected RED state).
